title: Chthonic Origins
description: A small Origin addon that adds some origins based on the underworld.
body:
Currently adds 4 origins:

**Child of Thanatos**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

an origin based around the Greek god of death
- Faded Specter (Become slightly transparent and have a dark tint)
- Raven's Wings (Automatically have an elytra)
- Dark Existence (Darkness immunity)
- Decay (Less hp)
- Reaping (Slightly more powerful)
- Fall Immunity

</details>



**V1 (Ultrakill)**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

V1 from ultrakill as an origin (enchancements mod recommended)
- Enhanced Mobility (faster movement and jump boost)
- Bloodthirsty (no natural regen, healing is done by dealing damage)
- Thin Armor (less health)
- War Machine (you deal more damage)
- Fall Immunity
- Camera Vision (vision is more akin to that of a camera)

</details>



**Cerberus**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

based on the gatekeeper to the underworld in Greek mythology
- Carnivore
- Fire Immunity
- Nether Spawn
- Rotted Hunger (Rotten flesh is a better food source)
- Gate Guardian (you are more powerful underground and in the nether, and are weaker aboveground)
- 3 Heads (more hp)

</details>
Version 1.1.0

**Cursed Werebat**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Cursed to live out your days as a hybrid werebat

- Scavenger's Hoard (A small inventory that is kept on death)

- Leathery Wings (Automatically have an elytra without needing to equip one)

- Claws (You deal more damage)

- Photoallergic (You burn in daylight)

</details>
